duas.title: Ziyarat Imam Hussain(as) - 15 Shaban
duas.description: The Prophets & The Angels visit Imam Hussain (as) on this night & performing the ziyarah is one of the most meritorious acts of this night.It has been said whoever wishes to shake hands with 124,000 prophets should perform this ziyarah on this night of 15th Sha'aban

segments.translation: All praise be to Allah; the Most High, the All-great.

segments.arabic: والسَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ أيُّها الْعَبْدُ الصَّالِحُ الزَّكيُّ
segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka ayyuha al`abdu alSSalihu alzzakiyy
segments.translation: Peace be upon you; O the righteous, pure servant (of Allah).

segments.arabic: اُودِعُكَ شَهادَةً مِنِّي لَكَ تُقَرِّبُني إلَيْكَ فِي يَوْمِ شَفاعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: udi`uka shahadatan minny laka tuqarribuny ilayka fi yawmi shafa`atika
segments.translation: I entrust with you a testimony of mine that takes me near you on the day of your intercession (for some people).

segments.transliteration: ash-hadu annaka qutilta wa lam tamut
segments.translation: I bear witness that although you were slain, you have not died;

segments.arabic: بَلْ بِرَجاءِ حَياتِكَ حَيِيَتْ قُلُوبُ شيعَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: bal biraja‘i hayatika hayiyat qulubu shi`atika
segments.translation: Rather the hearts of your adherents (Shi`ah) are living on the hope of your being alive;

segments.transliteration: wa biziya‘i nurika ahtada alttalibuna ilayka
segments.translation: And by the light of your illumination have those seeking you been guided (to the right path).

segments.arabic: وَأشْهَدُ أنَّكَ نُورُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يُطْفَأْ وَلا يُطْفَأُ أبَداً،
segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu annaka nuru allahi alladhy lam yutfa wa la yutfa’u abadan
segments.translation: And I bear witness that you are verily the Light of Allah that has not and shall never be extinguished.

segments.arabic: وَأنَّكَ وَجْهُ اللهِ الَّذي لَمْ يَهْلِكْ وَلا يُهْلَكُ أبَداً،
segments.transliteration: wa annaka wajhu allahi alladhy lam yahlik wa la yuhlaku abadan
segments.translation: And you are verily the Face of Allah that has not and shall never be perishing.

segments.transliteration: wa ash-hadu ann hadhihi alttrbata turbatuka
segments.translation: And I bear witness that this soil is yours,
And this holy precinct is yours.
And this death is the death of your body only,
While you have never been humiliated since Allah is the One Who is pouring honor upon you
And you have never been defeated since Allah is the One Who is supporting you.

segments.arabic: هذِهِ شَهادَةٌ لي عِنْدَكَ إلى يَوْمَ قَبْضِ روُحي بِحَضْرَتِكَ،
segments.transliteration: hadhihi shahadatun li `indaka ila yawmi qabzi ruhy bihazratika
segments.translation: I would like you to keep this testimony of mine with you up to the day when my soul will be grasped in the presence of you.

segments.transliteration: wa alssalamu `alayka wa rahmatu allahi wa barakatuhu
segments.translation: Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

duas.title: Short Ziyarat of Imam Husain(as)
duas.content:
The least one can do as a short salutation to Imam Hussain(as) is ,one may go to the terrace/elevated place, look left, right & towards the sky & recite :-

السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ يَا أَبَا عَبْدِ اللّه السَّلامُ عَلَيْكَ وَرَحْمَةُ اللّه وَبَرَكَاتُهُ

Assalamu Alalika Ya Aba Abdillah Assalamu Alaikum wa Rahmatullah e wabarakatoh
Peace be upon you; O Aba-`Abdullah! Peace and Allah’s mercy and blessings be upon you.

duas.title: Significance of this Ziyarat
duas.content:
Be it known to you that there are numerous traditions revealing the merits of visiting Imam al-Husayn (`a) on the fifteenth of Sha`ban.
As a sufficient merit, these narrations have been reported through several valid chains of authority from Imam Zayn al-`Abidin and Imam al-Sadiq as saying, “He who would like to be shaken hands by one hundred thousand and twenty-four prophets, may visit the tomb of Abu-`Abdullah al-Husayn on the fifteenth of Sha`ban, because the spirits of the prophets ask Almighty Allah to permit them to visit Imam al-Husayn’s tomb and the Almighty gives them permission. So, blessed be the one who shakes hands with these prophets among whom is the five constancy-endowed Messengers; namely, Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus, and Muhammad, peace be upon them all.”
When the reporter asked the Imam (`a) to explain the meaning of constancy-endowed, the Imam (`a) answered, “These prophets were sent to the east and west of the globe and to both humankind and jinn.”
There are two forms of visiting the holy tomb of Imam al-Husayn (`a) on the fifteenth of Sha`ban. The first form is the same as the one previously cited for ziyarah on the first of Rajab, and the second is on this page:
